assertionResults.fullName: furnitureFabricMapper maps entityId from furniture.id and uses default footprint when width/depth omitted
assertionResults.title: maps entityId from furniture.id and uses default footprint when width/depth omitted

assertionResults.fullName: furnitureFabricMapper uses explicit width/depth mm and scale for fabric size
assertionResults.title: uses explicit width/depth mm and scale for fabric size

assertionResults.fullName: furnitureFabricMapper round-trips position and rotation through fabric pose (project mm)
assertionResults.title: round-trips position and rotation through fabric pose (project mm)

assertionResults.fullName: furnitureFabricMapper normalizes negative and >360 rotation degrees
assertionResults.title: normalizes negative and >360 rotation degrees

assertionResults.fullName: furnitureFabricMapper marks locked furniture and maps list order
assertionResults.title: marks locked furniture and maps list order

assertionResults.fullName: furnitureFabricMapper read/write entityId on fabric-like carriers
assertionResults.title: read/write entityId on fabric-like carriers

assertionResults.fullName: furnitureFabricMapper preserves entityId after a synthetic drag (left/top change only)
assertionResults.title: preserves entityId after a synthetic drag (left/top change only)

assertionResults.fullName: isOpen3dFabricFurnitureEnabled is false by default and for non-1 values
assertionResults.title: is false by default and for non-1 values

assertionResults.title: is true only when env is exactly 1
